name: Crab and Cream Cheese Hors D'oeuvre
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together all ingredients except almonds in a bowl until smooth.
2. Add salt and pepper to taste.
3. Transfer mixture to a shallow baking dish.
4. Sprinkle slivered almonds evenly over the top.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until slightly browned on top, about 15-20 minutes.
6. Serve hot on crackers.
Makes 2 cups.
